name: Calculateur PER
description: Calculez le multiple PER d'une action.
seo_description: Calculez le debit d'eau, la perte de charge et le dimensionnement des tuyaux pour les systemes de plomberie. Essentiel pour la conception de l'alimentation en e
example_label: Calculezting P/E ratio for stock trading at $with earnings per share of $8.75.
result_context: The pe of {pe}x shows how many dollars investors pay per dollar of earnings.
formula_display: P/E Ratio = Share Price ÷ Earnings Per Share
mistakes: Comparing P/E ratios across different industries without context
Using P/E for companies with negative or distorted earnings
Not considering growth rate when evaluating P/E (use PEG ratio)
